pipelines.name: reid_{{CAMERA_NAME}}
pipelines.pipeline: rtspsrc location=rtsp://mediaserver:8554/{{CAMERA_NAME}} latency=100 protocols=tcp ! {{DECODE}} ! queue {{QUEUE_OPTIONS}} ! gvapython class=PostDecodeTimestampCapture function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=timesync ! queue {{QUEUE_OPTIONS}} ! gvadetect scheduling-policy=latency threshold={{DETECT_THRESHOLD}} scale-method=fast inference-interval={{INFERENCE_INTERVAL}} {{DETECTION_OPTIONS}} model=/home/pipeline-server/models/detect/{{DETECT_MODEL}}/{{DETECT_MODEL_PRECISION}}/{{DETECT_MODEL}}.xml model-proc=/home/pipeline-server/models/detect/{{DETECT_MODEL}}/{{DETECT_MODEL_PROC}} {{DETECT_LABELS}} name=detection device={{DETECT_DEVICE}} {{PRE_PROCESS}} {{PRE_PROCESS_CONFIG}} {{POST_DETECT}} ! gvatrack tracking-type=short-term-imageless ! gvainference {{REID_OPTIONS}} model=/home/pipeline-server/models/reid/{{REID_MODEL}}/{{REID_MODEL_PRECISION}}/{{REID_MODEL}}.xml inference-region=roi-list device={{REID_DEVICE}} {{REID_PRE_PROCESS}} ! gvametaconvert add-tensor-data=true name=metaconvert {{POST_INFERENCE}} ! queue ! gvapython class=PostInferenceDataPublish function=processFrame module=/home/pipeline-server/user_scripts/gvapython/sscape/sscape_adapter.py name=datapublisher ! gvametapublish name=destination ! appsink sync=true
